appraisal_events.evidence: Le duc attacha sur sa femme un long regard de stupéfaction voulue. duchesse de Guermantes se mit à rire. La princesse finit par s'en apercevoir... « Mais... est-ce que vous n'êtes pas... de mon avis ? »
appraisal_events.explanation: After the princess offers mixed praise of the Guermantes cousin and calls her 'médisante', the duke and duchess exchange a look and the duchess laughs, prompting the princess's anxious self-correction. This functions as a gentle social check on the princess.

status_effects.explanation: Her comment is implicitly disapproved by the Guermantes pair, leaving her unsettled and locally diminished in footing.
